title: SOLID, Code Smells, and Evidence-Driven Refactoring · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: Evolve a growing circulation system without changing its verified external behavior. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a refactored maintainable service. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Assign responsibilities by cohesive reason to change rather than forcing one method or one field per class.
Create extension points around observed stable variation without prebuilding speculative plugin systems.
Expose small client-specific roles so consumers do not depend on operations they cannot or should not use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

from typing import Any
